meaning: n.家庭教师,(大学)指导教师,助教,监护人,辅导教师v.辅导
examples: He was my personal tutor at university.
You seem to be on very familiar terms with your tutor.
Activities all take place under the guidance of an experienced tutor.
Perhaps you're a math tutor who can spare two hours a week at an after-school center.
Plus Tutor could encounter resistance from the Hollywood community when it comes to new production.
